summary: Initializes a WebAssembly-backed helper once and returns a shared promise for the resulting interface.
signature_intent: No-argument asynchronous initializer that resolves to module capabilities plus scoped mapping-callback execution.
behavior: Returns the existing initialization promise when initialization has already started or completed.
Loads binary data and instantiates it with host callbacks.
Converts low-level mapping callback data into a higher-level mapping object before delivering it to the active callback.
Adjusts line numbers to one-based form and end columns to inclusive form.
Provides access to the instantiated module capabilities.
Provides a wrapper that registers a callback only for the duration of a supplied operation.
Always unregisters the scoped callback after the supplied operation finishes or throws.
Emits console timing measurements for selected native operations.
edge_cases: Concurrent callers share the same pending initialization result.
If initialization fails, the stored promise is cleared so a later call can retry.
If the scoped operation throws, the callback is still unregistered and the error propagates.
Optional mapping fields are included only when indicated by the low-level callback data.
Nested scoped callback usage dispatches to the most recently registered callback.
forbidden_details: No variable names, repository names, source paths, or unnecessary implementation quirks are included.
